classes.reasoning: Document is explicitly labeled 'eTMF-003 — PROTOCOL DEVIATION LOG' in the header and footer 'CONTROLLED DOCUMENT — Update in eTMF only.' It tracks protocol deviations across multiple sites, a typical eTMF regulatory document.

summary: This is a Protocol Deviation Log (eTMF-003) for study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001, version 4 dated 01 December 2023. It records six protocol deviations across multiple European sites, categorized by type, severity, patient impact, and corrective actions, with five closed and one open deviation under investigation.
content:
# eTMF-003 — PROTOCOL DEVIATION LOG
## Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001
## Version: 4 | Date: 01 December 2023 | Owner: Clinical Operations
## CONTROLLED DOCUMENT — Update in eTMF only. Do not distribute.

| Dev.# | Site | Patient Code | Type | Description | Date Occurred | Date Reported | Category | Impact on Patient | Corrective Action | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DEV-001 | ES-01 | BRC471-ES01-003 | Visit window | C2D1 visit 3 days late (Day 32 vs Day 28 ±3) | 10 May 2023 | 12 May 2023 | Minor | None | Site retrained on visit windows | Closed |
| DEV-002 | FR-01 | BRC471-FR01-001 | Lab procedure | Pre-dose PK sample collected 45 min post-dose at C1D1 | 28 Apr 2023 | 02 May 2023 | Moderate | None — C1D1 PK excluded from analysis | PK manual reviewed with site pharmacist | Closed |
| DEV-003 | ES-02 | BRC471-ES02-005 | Eligibility | Patient enrolled with CrCl 47 mL/min (threshold >=50) | 15 Jun 2023 | 20 Jun 2023 | Major | None identified; CrCl 52 at next visit | Validated calculator provided; all sites audited | Closed |
| DEV-004 | DE-01 | BRC471-DE01-002 | Consent | Patient signed ICF v2.0 instead of v2.1 after amendment | 18 Nov 2023 | 22 Nov 2023 | Minor | Re-consented with v2.1 on 22 Nov | Site reminded of document update procedure | Closed |
| DEV-005 | IT-01 | BRC471-IT01-004 | Drug accountability | 10-tablet discrepancy at C3 dispensing | 30 Nov 2023 | 01 Dec 2023 | Moderate | Under investigation | Physical recount requested | Open |
| DEV-006 | NL-01 | BRC471-NL01-001 | Eligibility | CT scan at screening 34 days old (window <=28 days) | 05 Dec 2023 | 07 Dec 2023 | Minor | None — scan accepted by Medical Monitor | Site counselled on screening window | Closed |

**Total deviations:** 6 (5 closed, 1 open)
**Major deviations:** 1 (DEV-003 — reported to Ethics Committee 25 Jun 2023)
